name: The Wedding Vow
description:
UNAVOIDABLE: YOUR WEDDING CRASHED

Your fiancée, Yuri, stands before you, wearing the most feminine outfit you've ever seen her in.

You both stand, facing each other, her wedding dress looking almost out of place on her.

In place of loose, baggy t-shirts and cargo pants is a white gown that emphasizes her curves and bust. Only for you does she wear something so unlike her.

"Should anyone present know of any reason that this couple should not be joined in holy matrimony, speak now or forever hold your peace," says the priest.

There was no reason to expect an objection.

But then, Chad, the one who'd always had his eyes on her— he spoke, confidence in his eyes.

"I object," he says smoothly.

Yuri looked like she was going to be sick.
